example_1_en: The implementation must be shown on the engineering drawing.
example_1_zh: 實作方式必須呈現在工程圖面上。
example_2_en: Good implementation makes the design easier to verify.
example_2_zh: 良好的落實方式會讓設計更容易驗證。

chinese_meaning: 需求下展；要求逐層分配
example_1_en: Requirement flowdown helps each team understand its design responsibility.
example_1_zh: 需求下展可幫助各團隊了解自己的設計責任。
example_2_en: The EMC requirement must flow down to the avionics ring design.
example_2_zh: EMC 要求必須下展到航電環設計。

example_1_en: The allocated baseline defines the design-to requirements.
example_1_zh: 分配基準定義了設計所需符合的要求。
example_2_en: Each subsystem should follow the allocated baseline.
example_2_zh: 每個子系統都應遵循分配基準。

example_1_en: A mission requirement is usually defined at the highest level.
example_1_zh: 任務需求通常在最高層級定義。
example_2_en: The mission requirement drives the system-level EMC design.
example_2_zh: 任務需求會推動系統層級的 EMC 設計。

example_1_en: The system requirement must be traceable to the mission objective.
example_1_zh: 系統需求必須能追溯到任務目標。
example_2_en: A clear system requirement prevents different teams from using different assumptions.
example_2_zh: 清楚的系統需求可避免不同團隊使用不同假設。

example_1_en: Functional analysis breaks a high-level requirement into detailed functions.
example_1_zh: 功能分析會把高層級需求拆成詳細功能。
example_2_en: The team used functional analysis to define bonding interfaces.
example_2_zh: 團隊使用功能分析來定義接合介面。

example_1_en: Every subassembly should have electrical continuity to the next higher assembly.
example_1_zh: 每個次組件都應與上一層組件具有電氣連續性。
example_2_en: The avionics panel is treated as a subassembly of the ring.
example_2_zh: 航電板可視為航電環的一個次組件。

example_1_en: The interface constraint defines how the equipment is mounted and connected.
example_1_zh: 介面限制定義設備如何安裝與連接。
example_2_en: Bonding points should be included as interface constraints.
example_2_zh: 接合點應納入介面限制中。

example_1_en: The launch vehicle is exposed to a severe electromagnetic environment.
example_1_zh: 運載火箭會暴露在嚴苛的電磁環境中。
example_2_en: The electromagnetic environment includes onboard and external sources.
example_2_zh: 電磁環境包含機載與外部來源。

example_1_en: Onboard electronics can generate unintentional RF noise.
example_1_zh: 機載電子設備可能產生非預期 RF 雜訊。
example_2_en: The onboard power system must not disturb sensitive receivers.
example_2_zh: 機載電源系統不應干擾敏感接收器。

example_1_en: An external source may couple RF energy into the vehicle harness.
example_1_zh: 外部來源可能把 RF 能量耦合進載具線路。
example_2_en: Pad RF transmitters are one possible external source.
example_2_zh: 發射場 RF 發射機是一種可能的外部來源。

example_1_en: The structure must carry fault current until the protection device opens.
example_1_zh: 結構必須承載故障電流，直到保護裝置動作斷開。
example_2_en: A small contact area may overheat under fault current.
example_2_zh: 接觸面積太小可能在故障電流下過熱。

example_1_en: A short circuit to the chassis can create a shock hazard.
example_1_zh: 短路到機殼可能造成觸電危害。
example_2_en: The design should prevent a short circuit from entering the composite structure.
example_2_zh: 設計應避免短路電流進入複材結構。

example_1_en: A dedicated current return path is preferred for power circuits.
example_1_zh: 電源電路最好使用專用的電流回流路徑。
example_2_en: Do not rely on the composite panel as the current return path.
example_2_zh: 不要依賴複材板作為電流回流路徑。

example_1_en: The voltage drop must be controlled in the power return path.
example_1_zh: 電源回流路徑中的壓降必須受到控制。
example_2_en: Excessive voltage drop may reduce equipment margin.
example_2_zh: 過大的壓降可能降低設備裕度。

example_1_en: RF bonding requires a low impedance path, not just a low DC resistance.
example_1_zh: RF 接合需要低阻抗路徑，而不只是低直流電阻。
example_2_en: A wide and short path usually has lower impedance.
example_2_zh: 寬且短的路徑通常具有較低阻抗。

example_1_en: High-frequency currents require a low inductance return path.
example_1_zh: 高頻電流需要低電感回流路徑。
example_2_en: A long narrow strap does not provide low inductance.
example_2_zh: 又長又窄的帶材無法提供低電感。

example_1_en: Inductance increases the impedance at high frequency.
example_1_zh: 電感會提高高頻下的阻抗。
example_2_en: Reducing loop area helps reduce inductance.
example_2_zh: 減少迴路面積有助於降低電感。

example_1_en: Capacitance between structures can affect RF impedance.
example_1_zh: 結構之間的電容會影響 RF 阻抗。
example_2_en: The jumper and nearby metal can form unwanted capacitance.
example_2_zh: 跳接線與附近金屬可能形成非預期電容。

example_1_en: Reactance changes with frequency.
example_1_zh: 電抗會隨頻率改變。
example_2_en: Impedance includes resistance and reactance.
example_2_zh: 阻抗包含電阻與電抗。

example_1_en: DC resistance is easy to measure with a micro-ohmmeter.
example_1_zh: 直流電阻可用微歐姆計量測。
example_2_en: Low resistance does not always mean good RF performance.
example_2_zh: 低電阻不一定代表良好的 RF 性能。

example_1_en: A micro-ohmmeter is used to measure very low bonding resistance.
example_1_zh: 微歐姆計用於量測很低的接合電阻。
example_2_en: Use a four-wire method with the micro-ohmmeter.
example_2_zh: 使用微歐姆計時應採用四線式量測。

example_1_en: RF impedance is more important than DC resistance for high-frequency bonding.
example_1_zh: 對高頻接合而言，RF 阻抗比直流電阻更重要。
example_2_en: The reference ring should minimize RF impedance.
example_2_zh: 參考環應盡量降低 RF 阻抗。

example_1_en: The faying surface must be cleaned before assembly.
example_1_zh: 接合面在組裝前必須清潔。
example_2_en: Paint on the faying surface will degrade the electrical connection.
example_2_zh: 接合面上的油漆會降低電氣連接品質。

example_1_en: Both mating surfaces must be free of nonconductive films.
example_1_zh: 兩個配合面都必須沒有非導電薄膜。
example_2_en: The connector flange and panel mating surface require preparation.
example_2_zh: 接頭法蘭與面板配合面需要進行表面準備。

example_1_en: Metal-to-metal contact is preferred for RF performance.
example_1_zh: 金屬對金屬接觸對 RF 性能較佳。
example_2_en: A gasket may be needed when metal-to-metal contact is not reliable.
example_2_zh: 當金屬對金屬接觸不可靠時，可能需要墊片。

example_1_en: Nonconductive coating must be removed from the bonding area.
example_1_zh: 非導電塗層必須從接合區域移除。
example_2_en: A thin nonconductive coating can make a good joint electrically poor.
example_2_zh: 薄薄的非導電塗層可能讓良好的機械接合變成差的電氣接合。

example_1_en: Foreign matter on the contact area can increase resistance.
example_1_zh: 接觸區域上的異物會增加電阻。
example_2_en: Remove all chips, dust, and foreign matter before assembly.
example_2_zh: 組裝前應移除所有切屑、灰塵與異物。

chinese_meaning: 孔洞；開口；電磁洩漏開口
example_1_en: An unbonded seam can become an RF aperture.
example_1_zh: 未良好接合的接縫可能形成 RF 開口。
example_2_en: Reducing aperture size improves enclosure performance.
example_2_zh: 縮小開口尺寸可改善外殼性能。

example_1_en: A threaded fastener should not be the only current path.
example_1_zh: 螺紋緊固件不應成為唯一的電流路徑。
example_2_en: The threaded fastener mainly provides mechanical preload.
example_2_zh: 螺紋緊固件主要提供機械預緊力。

example_1_en: Rivets can provide good contact when installed correctly.
example_1_zh: 鉚釘若正確安裝，可提供良好接觸。
example_2_en: At least three rivets are often recommended for one junction.
example_2_zh: 一個接合點通常建議至少使用三個鉚釘。

example_1_en: Proper preload keeps the joint stable under vibration.
example_1_zh: 適當的預緊力可讓接點在振動下保持穩定。
example_2_en: Loss of preload may increase contact resistance.
example_2_zh: 預緊力喪失可能增加接觸電阻。

example_1_en: The joint must maintain contact in a dynamic environment.
example_1_zh: 接點必須在動態環境下維持接觸。
example_2_en: Vibration and shock are part of the dynamic environment.
example_2_zh: 振動與衝擊是動態環境的一部分。

example_1_en: Vibration can loosen a poorly designed connection.
example_1_zh: 振動可能使設計不良的連接鬆脫。
example_2_en: The strap must survive vibration without cracking.
example_2_zh: 該帶材必須能承受振動而不破裂。

example_1_en: A jumper may be used when direct contact is impractical.
example_1_zh: 當直接接觸不可行時，可使用跳接線。
example_2_en: The jumper should be short, wide, and easy to inspect.
example_2_zh: 跳接線應該短、寬且容易檢查。

example_1_en: A flat strap usually has lower inductance than a round wire.
example_1_zh: 扁平帶材通常比圓線有較低電感。
example_2_en: Keep the strap as short as possible.
example_2_zh: 盡可能縮短帶材長度。

example_1_en: The length-to-width ratio of the strap should be kept low.
example_1_zh: 帶材的長寬比應盡量低。
example_2_en: A high length-to-width ratio increases inductance.
example_2_zh: 高長寬比會增加電感。

example_1_en: Larger surface area improves current carrying capability.
example_1_zh: 較大的表面積可改善載流能力。
example_2_en: The design should maximize surface area at RF joints.
example_2_zh: 設計應最大化 RF 接點的接觸面積。

example_1_en: Surface condition affects contact resistance.
example_1_zh: 表面狀態會影響接觸電阻。
example_2_en: Roughness and hardness are part of surface condition.
example_2_zh: 粗糙度與硬度屬於表面狀態的一部分。

example_1_en: Cleanliness is essential for reliable electrical contact.
example_1_zh: 清潔度對可靠電氣接觸非常重要。
example_2_en: Poor cleanliness can cause unstable measurement results.
example_2_zh: 清潔度不佳可能造成量測結果不穩定。

chinese_meaning: 表面準備；表面處理前準備
example_1_en: Surface preparation must be defined before manufacturing.
example_1_zh: 表面準備必須在製造前定義清楚。
example_2_en: The drawing should specify the required surface preparation.
example_2_zh: 圖面應指定所需的表面準備。

example_1_en: Use abrasive material carefully to avoid damaging the base metal.
example_1_zh: 使用研磨材料時要小心，避免損傷基材。
example_2_en: The abrasive material should be compatible with the surface.
example_2_zh: 研磨材料應與表面材料相容。

example_1_en: Use an approved solvent to clean the faying surface.
example_1_zh: 使用核可的溶劑清潔接合面。
example_2_en: The solvent must be compatible with the hardware.
example_2_zh: 溶劑必須與硬體材料相容。

example_1_en: Apply sealant around the joint to prevent moisture intrusion.
example_1_zh: 在接點周圍塗佈密封膠以防止濕氣進入。
example_2_en: The sealant must not block the electrical contact area.
example_2_zh: 密封膠不得阻隔電氣接觸區域。

example_1_en: Plating can improve corrosion resistance and electrical contact.
example_1_zh: 電鍍可改善耐蝕性與電氣接觸。
example_2_en: The plating material must be selected for galvanic compatibility.
example_2_zh: 鍍層材料必須依電偶相容性選擇。

example_1_en: Tin plating is often used on copper or steel surfaces.
example_1_zh: 鍍錫常用於銅或鋼表面。
example_2_en: Tin plating may require special control to prevent whisker growth.
example_2_zh: 鍍錫可能需要特殊管制以避免錫鬚生長。

example_1_en: Nickel plating can reduce dissimilar-metal corrosion risk.
example_1_zh: 鍍鎳可降低異種金屬腐蝕風險。
example_2_en: Aluminum may be nickel-plated before mating with stainless steel.
example_2_zh: 鋁件與不鏽鋼接合前可進行鍍鎳處理。

example_1_en: Chemical conversion coating can protect aluminum while maintaining conductivity.
example_1_zh: 化學轉化膜可保護鋁材，同時維持導電能力。
example_2_en: The drawing may call out a Class 3 chemical conversion coating.
example_2_zh: 圖面可標註 Class 3 化學轉化膜。

example_1_en: Passivation improves the corrosion resistance of stainless steel.
example_1_zh: 鈍化處理可改善不鏽鋼的耐蝕性。
example_2_en: Passivation is not primarily an electrical bonding requirement.
example_2_zh: 鈍化處理主要不是電氣接合要求。

example_1_en: Anodize is usually nonconductive and must be removed from bonding areas.
example_1_zh: 陽極處理通常不導電，必須從接合區域移除。
example_2_en: The drawing should mask the contact area before anodize.
example_2_zh: 圖面應要求在陽極處理前遮蔽接觸區域。

example_1_en: Tin whisker growth can create reliability problems.
example_1_zh: 錫鬚生長可能造成可靠度問題。
example_2_en: Lead-alloyed tin may be used to reduce tin whisker risk.
example_2_zh: 含鉛合金錫可用於降低錫鬚風險。

example_1_en: Corrosion control must be considered together with electrical contact.
example_1_zh: 腐蝕控制必須與電氣接觸一起考量。
example_2_en: Poor corrosion control will degrade the joint over time.
example_2_zh: 腐蝕控制不佳會讓接點隨時間劣化。

example_1_en: The galvanic series helps compare material compatibility.
example_1_zh: 電偶序列可用來比較材料相容性。
example_2_en: Materials far apart in the galvanic series need special protection.
example_2_zh: 在電偶序列中相距很遠的材料需要特殊防護。

example_1_en: Carbon-fiber composites often behave as the cathode in a galvanic couple.
example_1_zh: 碳纖複材在電偶對中常表現為陰極。
example_2_en: The cathode is usually the more noble material.
example_2_zh: 陰極通常是較惰性、較耐蝕的材料。

example_1_en: The anode is the material that tends to corrode.
example_1_zh: 陽極是較容易腐蝕的材料。
example_2_en: Protect the anode when dissimilar metals cannot be avoided.
example_2_zh: 當無法避免異種金屬時，應保護陽極材料。

example_1_en: Moisture can act as an electrolyte in galvanic corrosion.
example_1_zh: 濕氣可在電偶腐蝕中扮演電解質。
example_2_en: Preventing electrolyte intrusion helps prevent corrosion.
example_2_zh: 防止電解質侵入有助於避免腐蝕。

example_1_en: Dissimilar metal contact should be reviewed by materials engineers.
example_1_zh: 異種金屬接觸應由材料工程師審查。
example_2_en: Use plating or sealing when dissimilar metal contact is unavoidable.
example_2_zh: 當無法避免異種金屬接觸時，應使用鍍層或密封處理。

example_1_en: Moisture can accelerate corrosion at the joint.
example_1_zh: 濕氣會加速接點腐蝕。
example_2_en: Seal the joint to keep moisture out.
example_2_zh: 密封接點以防止濕氣進入。

example_1_en: High current at a fastener can cause local heating and delamination.
example_1_zh: 緊固件處的高電流可能造成局部發熱與分層。
example_2_en: Composite delamination is a serious structural concern.
example_2_zh: 複材分層是嚴重的結構問題。

example_1_en: Volume resistivity determines whether a material can dissipate charge.
example_1_zh: 體積電阻率決定材料是否能釋放電荷。
example_2_en: Nonmetallic tubing may need a volume resistivity limit.
example_2_zh: 非金屬管路可能需要體積電阻率限制。

example_1_en: Graphite epoxy has much lower conductivity than aluminum.
example_1_zh: 石墨環氧材料的導電性遠低於鋁。
example_2_en: Additional metal paths can improve overall conductivity.
example_2_zh: 額外金屬路徑可改善整體導電性。

example_1_en: A conductive gasket can improve seam performance.
example_1_zh: 導電墊片可改善接縫性能。
example_2_en: The gasket must be compressed within the specified range.
example_2_zh: 墊片必須壓縮在規定範圍內。

example_1_en: Compression set affects whether a gasket can be reused.
example_1_zh: 壓縮永久變形會影響墊片是否可重複使用。
example_2_en: Low compression set is important for removable covers.
example_2_zh: 低壓縮永久變形對可拆蓋板很重要。

example_1_en: The chassis should be connected to the reference plane.
example_1_zh: 機殼應連接到參考平面。
example_2_en: A powered chassis must have a safe fault-current path.
example_2_zh: 有供電的機殼必須具有安全的故障電流路徑。

example_1_en: The copper layer acts as a local reference plane.
example_1_zh: 銅層可作為局部參考平面。
example_2_en: All critical shields should return to the reference plane.
example_2_zh: 所有關鍵屏蔽都應回到參考平面。

example_1_en: The goal is to make the structure as equipotential as practical.
example_1_zh: 目標是讓結構盡可能接近等電位。
example_2_en: An equipotential reference reduces unwanted voltage differences.
example_2_zh: 等電位參考可減少非預期電位差。

example_1_en: The avionics panel can be treated like a small equipment rack.
example_1_zh: 航電板可視為小型設備機架。
example_2_en: An equipment rack should provide defined mounting and bonding points.
example_2_zh: 設備機架應提供明確的安裝與接合點。

example_1_en: The mounting bracket must have a defined electrical path.
example_1_zh: 安裝支架必須有明確的電氣路徑。
example_2_en: Do not rely on a painted mounting bracket for RF return.
example_2_zh: 不要依賴有塗裝的安裝支架作為 RF 回流。

example_1_en: The mounting surface should be prepared before the connector is installed.
example_1_zh: 接頭安裝前，安裝面應先完成表面準備。
example_2_en: A painted mounting surface may isolate the chassis.
example_2_zh: 有塗裝的安裝面可能會使機殼電氣隔離。

chinese_meaning: 火工品；爆炸螺栓等火工裝置
example_1_en: Pyrotechnics require special attention to prevent accidental ignition.
example_1_zh: 火工品需要特別注意，以避免意外點燃。
example_2_en: Wires to pyrotechnics should be carefully shielded and terminated.
example_2_zh: 連到火工品的線路應仔細屏蔽並妥善終端處理。

example_1_en: High impedance at a joint can cause arc discharge.
example_1_zh: 接點高阻抗可能造成電弧放電。
example_2_en: Arc discharge near fuel or pyrotechnics is dangerous.
example_2_zh: 燃料或火工品附近的電弧放電很危險。

example_1_en: Resistance measurement can verify workmanship quality.
example_1_zh: 電阻量測可驗證施工品質。
example_2_en: Poor workmanship may create an intermittent connection.
example_2_zh: 施工品質不良可能造成間歇性連接。

example_1_en: Quality records should include bonding resistance measurements.
example_1_zh: 品質紀錄應包含接合電阻量測值。
example_2_en: The quality record supports final acceptance.
example_2_zh: 品質紀錄可支援最終驗收。

example_1_en: The engineering drawing must identify each bonded area.
example_1_zh: 工程圖面必須標示每個接合區域。
example_2_en: Manufacturing follows the notes on the engineering drawing.
example_2_zh: 製造單位依照工程圖面上的註記執行。

example_1_en: A drawing note should specify cleaning and resistance requirements.
example_1_zh: 圖面註記應指定清潔與電阻要求。
example_2_en: Use a local drawing note for a special bonding location.
example_2_zh: 對特殊接合位置使用局部圖面註記。

example_1_en: A general note applies to the entire drawing.
example_1_zh: 一般註記適用於整張圖面。
example_2_en: The general note can define the default cleaning requirement.
example_2_zh: 一般註記可定義預設清潔要求。

example_1_en: A local note applies only to a specific location.
example_1_zh: 局部註記只適用於特定位置。
example_2_en: Use a local note when one joint has a different resistance limit.
example_2_zh: 當某個接點有不同電阻限制時，使用局部註記。

example_1_en: A flag note can be reused at multiple drawing locations.
example_1_zh: 旗標註記可重複用於圖面多個位置。
example_2_en: The flag note identifies surfaces that require preparation.
example_2_zh: 旗標註記可標示需要表面準備的位置。

example_1_en: A verification matrix maps each bonding path to a test method.
example_1_zh: 驗證矩陣會將每條接合路徑對應到測試方法。
example_2_en: The avionics ring should have its own verification matrix.
example_2_zh: 航電環應建立自己的驗證矩陣。

example_1_en: The work instruction should describe how to prepare the surface.
example_1_zh: 作業指導書應說明如何進行表面準備。
example_2_en: Do not leave critical bonding steps only in the presentation.
example_2_zh: 不要只把關鍵接合步驟留在簡報中。

example_1_en: Each measurement result should be traceable to a specific joint.
example_1_zh: 每個量測結果都應可追溯到特定接點。
example_2_en: Requirements should be traceable from system level to design drawings.
example_2_zh: 要求應可從系統層級追溯到設計圖面。

example_1_en: The design should keep enough electrical and thermal margin.
example_1_zh: 設計應保留足夠的電氣與熱裕度。
example_2_en: A poor bonding path can reduce EMC margin.
example_2_zh: 不良接合路徑可能降低 EMC 裕度。

example_1_en: Corrosion mitigation must be included in the design.
example_1_zh: 設計中必須包含腐蝕緩解措施。
example_2_en: The copper reference ring is one mitigation for RF coupling.
example_2_zh: 銅參考環是降低 RF 耦合的一項措施。

example_1_en: The table values are assumptions, not final acceptance limits.
example_1_zh: 表格數值是假設，不是最終驗收限制。
example_2_en: Every design assumption should be reviewed with the consultant.
example_2_zh: 每個設計假設都應與顧問確認。
